name: review-architecture
description: アーキテクチャレビュースキル（設計整合性、コーディング規約、ドキュメント整合性の確認）
capabilities: Validates backend Java code against Google Java Style Guide and project rules
Checks frontend TypeScript strict mode compliance and React Hooks patterns
Verifies DRY principle adherence and identifies code duplication
Ensures documentation consistency for API, database, and error codes
Validates shadcn/ui component usage patterns in Next.js
Reviews package structure and RESTful API design conventions
author: Crearize
securitySummary: This is a pure documentation skill with no executable code. The static scanner produced false positives by misidentifying documentation markup (backticks for code blocks), file path references, and documentation filenames as security vulnerabilities. No network calls, no command execution, no cryptographic operations exist in this skill.
valueStatement: Ensure your code meets architectural standards and follows established patterns. This skill provides systematic architecture reviews for consistent, maintainable codebases across Spring Boot and Next.js projects.
userTitle: Review Architecture for Code Quality Standards
limitations: Requires existing coding rules documentation files to function
Optimized for Spring Boot backend and Next.js frontend only
Cannot execute code or run tests - only performs static analysis
Dependent on Japanese language documentation for full functionality

useCases.title: Architecture Consistency
useCases.description: Ensure new code follows established architectural patterns before merging to main branch.

useCases.title: Code Quality Gatekeeping
useCases.description: Automate code review processes to maintain consistent quality standards across the team.

useCases.title: CI/CD Integration
useCases.description: Integrate architecture reviews into CI/CD workflows to catch design issues early.

promptTemplates.title: Basic Architecture Review
promptTemplates.prompt: Review this Spring Boot code for architecture compliance: check package structure, naming conventions, DRY principles, and documentation updates.

promptTemplates.title: Frontend Standards
promptTemplates.prompt: Analyze this Next.js component for TypeScript strict mode compliance, proper React Hooks usage, and shadcn/ui best practices.

promptTemplates.title: API Design Review
promptTemplates.prompt: Check this API implementation for RESTful design principles, proper HTTP methods, and OpenAPI documentation alignment.

promptTemplates.title: Full Stack Audit
promptTemplates.prompt: Perform complete architecture review on this pull request covering backend Java standards, frontend TypeScript compliance, and documentation consistency.

bestPractices: Always read project documentation before starting reviews to understand context and requirements
Focus on new changes only - avoid repeating already addressed issues from previous reviews
Provide specific, actionable feedback with file paths and line numbers for easy fixes
antiPatterns: Don't review without understanding the project's coding standards and architecture patterns
Avoid generic feedback - always reference specific rules from backend-rules.md or frontend-rules.md
Never approve code that violates mandatory requirements like @SuppressWarnings or any types in TypeScript

faq.question: What coding standards does this skill validate?
faq.answer: Validates against Google Java Style Guide for backend and TypeScript strict mode for frontend plus project-specific rules.

faq.question: Can it review projects using different tech stacks?
faq.answer: Currently optimized for Spring Boot backend and Next.js frontend with shadcn/ui components only.

faq.question: How does it handle documentation updates?
faq.answer: Checks that error-codes.md, database-design.md, and api-docs.yaml are updated when relevant code changes are made.

faq.question: Is the skill safe to use on sensitive codebases?
faq.answer: Yes, it's documentation-only with no network access or code execution - purely analysis and recommendations.

faq.question: What if my project does not have coding rules files?
faq.answer: The skill requires existing documentation files like backend-rules.md and frontend-rules.md to function properly.

faq.question: How strict is the review process?
faq.answer: Very strict - all mandatory conditions must be met for approval with zero tolerance for critical violations.
